Whono
A minimal Astro theme
for essays, notes, and docs.
Designed for reading,
open-source.

About

Hello, and welcome.

This is the about page example for the Whono theme.

The sample content covers a site intro, a friends list, an FAQ, and contact details. Replace it with your own when you are ready.

Friends

  • AAstroA modern frontend framework for building high-performance content sites.
  • WWhonoA minimal two-column Astro theme.

FAQ

QHow do I exchange friend links?

You can reach me via a GitHub Issue or send an email. Please include your site name, link, description, and avatar.

Name
Whono
Link
https://astro.whono.me/
Description
A minimal two-column Astro theme
Avatar
https://astro.whono.me/author/avatar.webp
QCan I repost content from here?

Please credit the source when reposting. If an individual article states its own license, follow that article’s terms.

Contact

If you have questions, suggestions, or want to subscribe to updates, feel free to reach out.

  • cxro/astro-whono
  • yourname
  • Astro@Whono.me
